_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in evaluating tools for implementation
reference_document_element_description: Evaluate and select ML platform tooling, producing architectural decision records with documented rationale and re-evaluation criteria.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Task AI-T-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-003 (TF, cosine: 0.548), OP-S-008 (OP, cosine: 0.537).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.581). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. NICE-only terms [evaluating, implementation, skill, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [architectural, criteria, decision, documented, evaluate, evaluation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.899, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.039 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in evaluating tools for implementation" and "Evaluate and select ML platform tooling, producing architectural decision record" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.580 ≈ STS 0.581 (gap 0.001). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. NICE terms: [evaluating, implementation, skill, tools]. WIDAI terms: [architectural, criteria, decision, documented, evaluate, evaluation].
